---



---


Enabled the "Voice Simulation" button. Changes:

1. Removed the `disabled` prop
2. Added `onClick={() => handleLaunch("voice")}` to launch voice simulations
3. Updated styling to match the "Chat Simulation" button (white text, hover effects)
4. Added `disabled={isLaunching}` so it's disabled while launching

The button now launches voice simulations the same way the chat simulation button does.
